CO-DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMME

You bring the use case. We bring the technology.

We're selecting up to 5 companies with assets or environments we haven't monitored yet. Together, we prove SAM4 works — and publish the results.

Submit your use case Download the full policy

Why co-develop?

01

Access technology early

Get SAM4 on an asset type or environment that isn't commercially available yet. You shape the deployment. We shape the product.

02

Reduce your risk

Pay 50% of standard pricing during the 6-month pilot. If it works, lock in a 25% discount for 3 years. If it doesn't, walk away.

03

Build your proof

Co-publish the results as a case study. Demonstrate predictive maintenance ROI to your leadership with independent, measured data.

How it works

01

Submit your use case

Describe the asset, the environment, and the problem in 3 sentences. We respond within one week.

02

Joint scoping

Our engineering team assesses feasibility. We define success criteria together — what 'working' means for your specific use case.

03

6-month pilot

SAM4 hardware installed. Dedicated engineer assigned. Bi-weekly feedback sessions for the first 3 months, monthly reports throughout.

04

Results and conversion

If the pilot meets agreed criteria, you convert to a 3-year contract at 25% below list price. If not, hardware returned, no obligation.

The deal

What Samotics provides

  • SAM4 hardware and installation
  • Dedicated co-development engineer
  • Analytics dashboard and diagnostics
  • Monthly progress reports
  • Priority support (48-hour SLA)

What you provide

  • Site access for installation
  • Senior technical contact
  • Bi-weekly feedback (first 3 months)
  • Domain expertise on the target asset
  • Permission to co-publish results

What makes a strong use case?

New asset type

A rotating asset not yet in the SAM4 detection library.

Hard-to-reach environment

Offshore, underground, ATEX zones, extreme temperatures.

Vibration isn't viable

The asset can't be reached by conventional vibration sensors.

High fleet potential

The use case applies to hundreds or thousands of similar assets.

5
Partner slots for 2026
50%
Pilot pricing
25%
Post-pilot discount

Ready to co-develop?

Send us your use case in 3 sentences. Asset type, environment, and the problem you're trying to solve. We'll respond within a week.
